title: NAIS Agent Manifest
description: JSON Schema for the Network Agent Identity Standard (NAIS) agent manifest. This schema validates the agent.json file published at /.well-known/agent.json on NAIS-compliant domains.

standard.description: The NAIS standard identifier and version. Must follow the format 'nais/<version>'.

id.description: The canonical domain identity of the agent. This should match the domain where the manifest is published.

name.description: A human-readable display name for the agent.

description.description: A human-readable description of the agent's purpose, features, and behavior.

version.description: The version of this agent manifest, following semantic versioning.

capabilities.description: The list of capabilities (tools) this agent exposes.

proofs.description: Cryptographic or DNS-based proofs that bind identity claims to this agent.

tags.description: Freeform tags for discovery and categorization.

license.description: An SPDX license identifier or URL describing the terms under which this agent is offered.

source.description: URL to the source code repository for this agent.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this manifest.

Owner.description: The owner or operator of this agent. Supports both organizational and wallet-based ownership.

name.description: Display name of the owner or organization.

url.description: URL for the owner's website or profile.

contact.description: Contact email or URI for the owner.

wallet.description: Primary wallet address of the owner (shorthand for single-wallet ownership).

wallets.description: List of wallet identities associated with the owner, supporting multi-chain ownership.

WalletIdentity.description: A wallet identity on a specific blockchain, identified by CAIP-2 chain ID and address.

chain.description: CAIP-2 chain identifier (e.g., 'eip155:1' for Ethereum mainnet, 'eip155:8453' for Base).

address.description: The wallet address on the specified chain.

Service.description: Service endpoints for interacting with the agent.

mcp_endpoint.description: The primary MCP (Model Context Protocol) endpoint for this agent.

openapi_endpoint.description: An OpenAPI-compatible REST endpoint, if available.

api_endpoint.description: A generic API endpoint for non-MCP access.

health_endpoint.description: A health-check endpoint that returns agent availability status.

status_endpoint.description: A status endpoint providing operational metrics or uptime information.

docs_url.description: URL to human-readable documentation for this agent.

Auth.description: Authentication configuration for accessing the agent's services.

methods.description: Supported authentication methods, in order of preference.

wallet_chains.description: Blockchain networks accepted for wallet-based authentication.

challenge_endpoint.description: Endpoint that issues authentication challenges (e.g., for wallet signature flows).

verify_endpoint.description: Endpoint that verifies signed authentication challenges.

token_endpoint.description: Endpoint for obtaining access tokens (e.g., OAuth2 token exchange).

notes.description: Human-readable notes about authentication requirements or tiers.

Capability.description: A single capability (tool or function) that the agent can perform.

name.description: Machine-readable name of the capability. Should be unique within this manifest.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this capability does.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the expected input for this capability.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the expected output of this capability.

CapabilityPricing.description: Pricing information for a specific capability.

model.description: The pricing model for this capability.

amount.description: The price amount as a decimal string.

free_tier.description: Whether this capability has a free usage tier.

receiver.description: Default payment receiver address or account identifier.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about payment terms or pricing structure.

FreeTier.description: Free tier rate limits and scope.

capabilities.description: List of capability names available in the free tier.

price_per_call.description: Per-capability pricing as a map of capability name to price string.

free_quota.description: Number of free calls before x402 payment is required.

chain.description: The blockchain network for x402 payments.

chain_id.description: Numeric chain ID for the payment network.

payment_address.description: The wallet address that receives payments.

Proof.description: A verifiable proof binding an identity claim to this agent.

record.description: The DNS record or resource associated with this proof.

value.description: The proof value, such as a signature or hash.

verified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this proof was last verified.

Contact.description: Contact information for the agent operator.

issues.description: URL for filing issues or bug reports.
